prompt_text:
### Demographics: 79-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 15 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Female Breast Cancer (Endocrine Therapy)
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
Community-acquired pneumonia (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older brother)
- Social history: Current smoker (5 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~5 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Letrozole (2.5 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 83.8 kg; Height 158.4 cm; BMI 33.4 kg/m²; Blood pressure 123/88 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 11.3%; 9 months ago 11.0%; 6 months ago 11.0%; 3 months ago 10.5%; current 9.9%), FPG (12 months ago 250mg/dL; 9 months ago 320mg/dL; 6 months ago 242mg/dL; 3 months ago 253mg/dL; current 242mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 85.7kg; 9 months ago 80.6kg; 6 months ago 81.9kg; 3 months ago 82.2kg; current 83.8kg), Height (12 months ago 158.4cm; 9 months ago 158.4cm; 6 months ago 158.4cm; 3 months ago 158.4cm; current 158.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 33.0kg/m²; current 33.4kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 125mmHg; 9 months ago 129mmHg; 6 months ago 128mmHg; 3 months ago 127mmHg; current 123mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 88mmHg; 9 months ago 84mmHg; 6 months ago 87mmHg; 3 months ago 87mmHg; current 88mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 106U/L; 9 months ago 115U/L; 6 months ago 113U/L; 3 months ago 113U/L; current 111U/L), AST (12 months ago 86U/L; 9 months ago 78U/L; 6 months ago 77U/L; 3 months ago 75U/L; current 82U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.2mg/dL; current 1.3mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 42mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 44mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 43mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 40mL/min/1.73m²; current 41mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 205mg/g; 9 months ago 221mg/g; 6 months ago 161mg/g; 3 months ago 176mg/g; current 230mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 99mg/dL; 9 months ago 96mg/dL; 6 months ago 98mg/dL; 3 months ago 96mg/dL; current 95mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 45mg/dL; 9 months ago 42mg/dL; 6 months ago 43mg/dL; 3 months ago 46mg/dL; current 44mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 171mg/dL; 9 months ago 171mg/dL; 6 months ago 156mg/dL; 3 months ago 153mg/dL; current 161mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.8g/dL; 6 months ago 12.1g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 12.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.75 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
